summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TradeSignal AI dashboard. All backend APIs working perfectly (13/13 tests passed). Frontend UI fully functional with all major components loading correctly, filters working, and AI analysis integration operational.
passed_tests: Root API endpoint (/api/) returns correct response
Economic calendar API with all market filters (all, indices, gbpusd, eurusd)
Economic calendar API with all impact filters (all, high, medium, low)
AI analysis API returns proper structure with signal/probability/reasoning
Week overview API shows 5-day structure correctly
Main dashboard loads with all sections visible
AI Analysis card displays signal (CAUTION), probability (62%), market outlook, key factors, and recommended action
Week Overview shows 5 day cards (Mon-Fri) with individual signals and probability percentages
Economic Calendar table displays events with Time, Currency, Event, Impact, Source columns
Market filter buttons (All Markets, Indices, GBP/USD, EUR/USD) are clickable and functional
Impact filter tabs (All, High, Medium, Low) filter calendar events correctly
Date picker opens and functions properly
Week navigation (prev/next week) buttons work and update data
Day cards in Week Overview are clickable and update AI Analysis
Refresh analysis button triggers AI re-analysis
ForexFactory data integration with sample fallback working
Emergent LLM GPT-5.2 integration functional for AI analysis
